svg.text: GENERAL SCHEMATIC SINGLE LINE DIAGRAM (SLD) — ELECTRICAL & MEP SERVICES
Surge Protection Device (SPD) Class II fitted | Earth Leakage Relay
Main Earth: 16mm² CPC to Earth Rod | MET bonding rail
Main Earth: 16mm² Cu CPC — MDB to 2× earth rods (min 1200mm depth)
Main Bonding: 10mm² to incoming water/gas/oil service + structural steel
Pool Equipotential: 4mm² Cu ring — all pool metalwork bonded to MET
Sauna Bonding: 6mm² to metal frame + benches + door frame
Gate Bonding: 6mm² to gate frame + motor case + fence sections
System: TN-S throughout | PME earth not used at pool/sauna | Zs: <1.0Ω at all points
TOTAL INSTALLED 100A MCCB 64.0kW max demand ~90A after diversity
① All circuits comply with BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 (IET Wiring Regulations 18th Ed.) ② All cable sizes are minimum — verify by voltage drop calculation for final cable runs
③ Pool and sauna circuits require special location inspection per IEC 60364-7 ④ RCBO type B specified for motor/inductive loads (pool pump, gate motor, sauna) ⑤ All outdoor equipment minimum IP44
⑥ This is a GENERAL SCHEMATIC — exact cable routes, containment, and circuit details are shown on installation drawings ⑦ Verify utility supply capacity with UMEME before commissioning
⑧ Earth fault loop impedance to be tested at all final circuits ⑨ Sauna: IEC 60364-7-703 | Pool: IEC 60364-7-702 | Gate: BS EN 12453 ⑩ As-built drawing to be issued after final inspection
